changeSet.rollback: ALTER TABLE vehicle_submodel DROP CONSTRAINT ck_vehicle_submodel_powertrain; ALTER TABLE vehicle_submodel DROP COLUMN powertrain;

changeSet.rollback: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS endorsement; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS quotation_driver;

changeSet.rollback: DELETE FROM role_permission WHERE permission_code = 'policy.endorse'; DELETE FROM permission WHERE code = 'policy.endorse';
